entry.title: New: RES25-181 (Honolulu) — CCL
entry.content:
TO REQUEST ADDITIONAL FUNDS FOR CONTRACT NO. SC-COR-2400010 TO CONTINUE THE SERVICES OF LYNN E. PANAGAKOS, ATTORNEY AT LAW, AS SPECIAL COUNSEL FOR THE CITY AND COUNTY OF HONOLULU TO REPRESENT DEFENDANT DONNA YUK LAN LEONG IN A MATTER ENTITLED UNITED STATES V. DONNA YUK LAN LEONG, ETAL., CRIMINAL NO. CR21-00142 LEK (USDC).

Latest action: Committee report and Resolution were adopted.

View on the council site
